title: Cyberspace
description: Transfer your contraptions into the Cyberspace
body:

### { **Description** }

Cyberspace is a pocket dimension mod that allows you to build seamlessly while reducing lag in your main world.

It is still an open concept and in its early stages. This mod can evolve in many directions from here—I have some ideas, but let's develop it together! Share your thoughts here or on Discord.

### { **Authors** }

➤ Jackman & DinoSoup @ Breadworks
